artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA faceplate for Sump Pump No.1 showing an active Fail To Stop Alarm.
artifact_blurb: A SCADA system interface screenshot featuring the 'Sump Pump No.1' operational faceplate, prominently displaying an active 'Fail To Stop Alarm' highlighted in orange to demonstrate alarm notification capabilities within the control software.
